text.value: Laboratory Report
Laboratory studies

tr.td: Ketones [Presence] in Urine by Test strip

Erythrocytes [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field
Epithelial cells [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field

Mucus [Presence] in Urine sediment by Light microscopy
Bacteria [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field
Bacteria identified in Urine by Culture

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The urine findings indicate a urinary tract infection (UTI) with significant bacteriuria (>100,000 CFU/mL E. coli), positive nitrites, leukocyte esterase, hematuria, and marked pyuria. The low specific gravity may reflect dilute urine. No casts are seen, suggesting no upper tract involvement. Recommend clinical correlation and appropriate antibiotic therapy.

text.value: Alexandria Julien

text.div: Provider Organization: Centre Médical et Pédagogique Jacques Arnaud
